---
title: "Outbreaks"
---

# Outbreaks

Select an outbreak below to view the latest evidence surveillance table and download the current dataset.

Each outbreak has its own folder and CSV file. Columns may differ between outbreaks depending on the surveillance needs for that topic.

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### Mpox

Evidence surveillance table for mpox literature.

[View evidence table](outbreaks/mpox/)
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Hantavirus

Evidence surveillance table for Hantavirus literature.

[View evidence table](outbreaks/hantavirus/)
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Bundibugyo Ebolavirus

Evidence surveillance table for Bundibugyo Ebolavirus literature.

[View evidence table](outbreaks/bundibugyo-ebola/)
:::

:::
